calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Mark Burnside, Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Amazon.com Services LLC, is present.
Yolanda Fox for Respondent/Plaintiff is present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Mr. Burnside presents his case on behalf of Amazon.com Services LLC.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Conditions of Use
Exhibit 5 - May 2021 Comms
Exhibit 6 - June 2121 Comms
Exhibit 7 - October 2021 Comms
Exhibit 2 - A to Z Guarantee
Exhibit 8 - April 2022 Comms
Exhibit 4 - Receipt

Yolanda Fox testifies on her own behalf and provides additional photographs to the court.

Mr. Burnside further presents his case on behalf of Amazon.com Services LLC.

Yolanda Fox further testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Respondent's additional photographs are returned.

Judge: Honorable Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: KCColobong, Not reported. (D303).
